---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a CodePilot public beta improvement without sharing private data
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement, beta
assignees: ""
---

## Workflow

What AI coding workflow would this improve?

Who is affected?

- [ ] Existing Codex CLI users
- [ ] Public beta testers setting up CodePilot for the first time
- [ ] Users monitoring or steering sessions from iPhone
- [ ] Users managing multiple Codex account profiles
- [ ] Documentation or support readers

## Proposed Improvement

Describe the behavior you want CodePilot to support.

## Current Workaround

Describe what you do today, if anything.

## Setup Context

- Mac app, iPhone app, gateway, Cloudflare setup, account switching, remote desktop, notifications, file upload, or docs:
- Codex CLI already working on the Mac: yes/no/not sure
- Connection path: Cloudflare Tunnel / other / not applicable

## Beta Safety

Keep requests beta-focused. Do not add pricing, subscription, App Store availability, production-team readiness, hosted account, LAN setup, or non-Codex provider claims unless maintainer approval already exists.

Do not include Codex auth files, gateway bearer tokens, private hostnames, tunnel URLs, personal account names, email addresses, Apple identifiers, local file paths, private prompts, uploaded files, repository names, or live desktop contents.
